title: Community Interaction Features and some fixes

texts: Added the ability for users to add images to posts.
Added the Community Assets page, allowing users to upload emotes and stickers to use as tokens around the site. Buttons have been added to the editor toolbar to open pickers for them.
Added a Community Poll section to the homepage.
Added choice events functionality to Encounters. Added the choice events for Line 6.

A number of status icons from the Middle Outis and RR6 update had their color channels swapped when first uploaded. They have been fixed and reuploaded. If you're still seeing broken images, you may have to clear cache if you want to force the site to load the corrected ones.
Added a Walpurgisnacht row to the days left table in the Timers and Roadmap page.
Added more links and fixed the styling of some parts of the APR page.
The Markdown Editor toolbar has been slightly redesigned.
Fixed an issue with some timers on the site missing the start date option.
Implemented the min resist computation for Middle Outis' S3-4.
Fixed the title of Middle Outis' Identity page showing up as 'Identity not Found'.
Fixed an issue in Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote's passives not displaying some parts properly.
Changed upload limitations to avatars to prevent uploading invalid file types.
Reworded part of the intro to the Community Rankings page.
